description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular messenger-style handbag with a structured yet slightly slouchy form. The main body is crafted from a dark green material, with a contrasting tan trim along the top edge and a matching tan adjustable shoulder strap. The front flap is secured with two visible snap buttons and features a stitched leather patch emblem at the center. The sides and back of the bag are plain, with the strap attached via metal rings and reinforced leather patches. The overall finish is semi-matte, and the bag appears to be made of a combination of leather or faux leather and durable fabric, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A dark green messenger-style handbag with tan trim, an adjustable shoulder strap, and a front flap featuring a stitched emblem. The bag has a semi-matte finish and a structured yet flexible form.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green flap, tan trim, stitched emblem, and the full width of the adjustable strap.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the bag, the strap attachment, and the side seam details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panel and the continuation of the tan strap.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the strap attachment and the bag's depth.
attribute_brand_logo: A stitched leather patch emblem is centered on the front flap, circular in shape with embossed detailing.
attribute_strap_type: Single long adjustable shoulder or crossbody strap, tan in color, attached with metal rings on each side.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Front flap with two snap buttons as the primary closure, located at the lower corners of the flap.
attribute_decorative_elements: Stitched leather patch emblem on the front flap.
attribute_pattern: None; the exterior is primarily solid dark green with plain tan trim.
